recentTweets.text: We need more people like this in the Senate.
Let’s be clear: Trump WAS on the ballot today!
.@MalloryMcMorrow is fighting to make government work for working families — and that’s a fight worth joining. Let’s go. https://t.co/ar1QmEHRS4
We need more candidates like this…
Fucking thugs.  https://t.co/q2G1fNR2Sw
You heard the man. Let's get to work.

Happy Pride, New Mexico! I’m proud of everything we’ve done to make our state a welcoming and supportive place for our LGBTQ+ community. We know that love is love and we’ll always stand with you to make sure that we never roll back the progress that we’ve made. https://t.co/0AABI92Rcg
We are.

New Mexico needs a strong voice in Washington now more than ever. From fighting back against Trump’s harmful policies to expanding on the progress we’ve made here in New Mexico, the stakes are simply too high. I will not walk away from that responsibility. https://t.co/cZCegm4cJQ
On this day in 1912, the Land of Enchantment officially became the 47th–and greatest–state in our union. Happy Birthday, New Mexico! https://t.co/v0aGfnom7M
When you elect a clown, you get a circus.
Right back atcha!

As we face the prospect of President-Elect Donald Trump and his extreme and divisive agenda, I want New Mexicans to know that I remain deeply committed to protecting the progress we’ve made.

Together, we will hold the line and defend the values that make our state strong. https://t.co/nBZIVlxRYx
Thank you, New Mexico. I am honored, humbled, and ready to keep fighting for our future. https://t.co/lN5QszGmsT
New Mexico, you know the drill: if you’re in line, stay in line!
A special message for @NellaforSenate from her U.S. Senators. https://t.co/QZZEfDwB3H

Republicans want to sell off our country’s natural wonders, lands that belong to YOU.

When people like Nella Domenici, Yvette Herrell, and the creators of Project 2025 tell you they’re coming for them–believe it.

Public lands must remain in public hands.
https://t.co/GKH7mfh83B
Notice he doesn’t say he’s here because you matter. It’s all about him.
https://t.co/2ds7p4Svnx

All we get from Trump and Nella is trash talk. You’ll never hear them campaign on how great our national labs are or how we’re building one of the biggest clean energy projects on the planet or that we’re standing up universal pre-K.

They both look down on New Mexico.

Nella Domenici had two opportunities to answer a question on how to ensure the solvency of Social Security, and she completely ignored it both times. 

She’s not here to protect your Social Security, she’s here to help her wealthy friends. https://t.co/TilAkNnvLe
Had to make a stop for tamales at Silver Moon Cafe in Santa Rosa. https://t.co/DIpBWo3Pfb
Just what we need. A guy with brain worms running the Department of Health and Human Services.

Why is Trump campaigning in NYC and Albuquerque? Because he’s NOT campaigning. He knows he’s losing.  These are Insurrection 2.0 rallies. He’s pumping up his supporters for denial and violence.

https://t.co/QKHfwNpXRp

The largest clean energy project in American history is right here in New Mexico. 

They said it was impossible–but I pushed it through.

Now it's boosting our economy, powering millions of homes, and creating careers New Mexicans can build families around. 

It's a game changer. https://t.co/qxBeYEJODY

Nella loves to trash talk New Mexico without offering solutions.

That's because someone who was gone for 50 years and only moved back to buy herself a Senate seat doesn't understand the issues and definitely doesn't know how to solve them. https://t.co/SZQkYMzKQJ
@ozempicforlife 🌶️ link in bio

I guess JD Vance hasn’t heard of the Inflation Reduction Act. 

I’ll help him out: it was the largest investment in American clean energy manufacturing EVER and it was passed by Democrats during the Biden Harris administration.

In New Mexico we have a saying, “Dime con quién andas, y te diré quien eres.”

It means “Tell me who you hang around with, and I’ll tell you who you are.”

The folks bankrolling Nella’s campaign are the same ones who destroyed Roe and are committed to passing a national ban. https://t.co/BpzjZWrgCM
It isn’t defamatory to point out when a wolf drapes itself in sheep's clothing. This sort of petulant behavior is right out of Donald Trump's playbook. https://t.co/myNHc01CSo
Can confirm.
That’s funny, because we actually just had a vote on expanding the Child Tax Credit a couple of weeks ago and he missed it.

We tried to come together with Republicans on border security. Donald Trump told them to walk away and they did, because Republicans don’t actually want to fix this. They want an issue, not a solution.

Democrats are going to continue to support solutions. https://t.co/gnc7biTwFM

I want universal school meals programs like the one we have in New Mexico and the one @Tim_Walz signed into law in Minnesota to be available to students across the country.

We are one of the richest countries in the world, and our children should never go hungry. https://t.co/Ucw8qJLk6m

.@Tim_Walz  is the real deal. Whether it’s standing up for our rights and freedoms or championing working families, he embodies the values that make our country strong. Proud to stand with him and @KamalaHarris as they fight for all Americans, from the heartland to the mesas.

Donald Trump is a felon and @KamalaHarris is a prosecutor.

Republicans are scared. 

They should be.
There will not be a single Republican on the ballot this November who you can trust to protect abortion access. Do not risk it.
Joe Biden just put America first. Again. That’s REAL greatness.

This is the biggest swing in enthusiasm I've ever witnessed in politics.

From moment one, @KamalaHarris took command of the campaign and treated it the way she prosecutes a case.

And I think the attacks on her are an indication of just how scared the Trump campaign is. https://t.co/DaznUclIGT
The age issue is off the table…for our party. https://t.co/R0eHJCoUWF

I have never seen Democrats so united. We have so much momentum and enthusiasm and it feels really good. 

And let me say this now: @KamalaHarris will carry New Mexico. https://t.co/F1r4vOzcf2
My neighbors move quickly. All in for Kamala Harris! https://t.co/JyRHoO6EDE

Vice President Kamala Harris is an extraordinary leader with a proven track record of getting things done. As her colleague, I saw her commitment to fighting for working families up close. https://t.co/JvpjSrohOS
While the decision to withdraw from the campaign is President Biden's alone, I believe it is in the best interests of our country for him to step aside. https://t.co/45mSrr9xV2
My statement: https://t.co/DsHwXuiayO

Today I went on @CNN to speak with @kaitlancollins about how Democrats keep getting left at the altar when it comes to border security and immigration because Republicans and Donald Trump would rather have an issue than solve a problem. https://t.co/PkWSOMZMYv

In New Mexico, Indigenous Peoples’ Day replaced Columbus Day back in 2019.

We believe in celebrating America’s Tribal Nations, not the violence committed against them.

It’s time we had a national holiday to honor our Tribes and Pueblos, so I introduced a bill to do just that.
We need to understand that the Republicans who are turning against Ukraine are really turning against democracy and freedom.
The beginning of the school year isn’t exciting for everyone, I know. But this year New Mexico has something to celebrate: universal free meals for our K-12 students!
Welcome to New Mexico, @JoeBiden! I’m excited to discuss the Inflation Reduction Act and whether you prefer red or green.
https://t.co/X9YSEbYUGm

For a decade now, @BenRayLujan has been leading the charge to expand RECA and finally give what is owed to our Downwinders.

Yesterday, his amendment passed the Senate. Now it’s on its way to the House. We are so close to getting this signed into law. 

Let's get it done.

In 1990, the Radiation Exposure Compensation Act was passed, establishing a federal fund for people affected by radiation exposure.

For reasons I can’t even begin to understand, New Mexico Downwinders were excluded.

How is it possible that the communities at the center of the first nuclear test were not covered by a program designed for those harmed by nuclear tests?

Well, I promised an update…

Planning on seeing Oppenheimer this weekend? Well, I have an important update on the story the movie didn’t tell.

The film showed a remote test site in the New Mexico desert. An isolated area 210 miles south of Los Alamos, according to government accounts.

Not quite. 🧵

In the Tularosa Basin, those now known as Downwinders were exposed to dangerous levels of radiation, marking them and their descendants w/ tragedy ever since. They developed cancers and other illnesses. Infant mortality spiked.

78 years later, they’ve still not been compensated.

As many as 500,000 people lived within 150 miles of the test site, with some only 12 miles away. None were warned, and none were evacuated before or after Trinity.

The fallout reached 46 states, and the blast was felt as far as 200 miles away. Ash fell from the sky for days.
If a Supreme Court justice can’t find the provision that gives Congress the authority to regulate SCOTUS then I have some follow-up questions.
Come on, man. https://t.co/5xYeOZwO8g
Oh?

kurdistanMentions.text:
All we get from Trump and Nella is trash talk. You’ll never hear them campaign on how great our national labs are or how we’re building one of the biggest clean energy projects on the planet or that we’re standing up universal pre-K.

They both look down on New Mexico.

The largest clean energy project in American history is right here in New Mexico. 

They said it was impossible–but I pushed it through.

Now it's boosting our economy, powering millions of homes, and creating careers New Mexicans can build families around. 

It's a game changer. https://t.co/qxBeYEJODY

I guess JD Vance hasn’t heard of the Inflation Reduction Act. 

I’ll help him out: it was the largest investment in American clean energy manufacturing EVER and it was passed by Democrats during the Biden Harris administration.

Here's a few off the top of my head:

✅ Historically low unemployment rate
✅ 12 million new jobs
✅ $35 cap on insulin for seniors
✅ More Americans than ever have quality, affordable health care
✅ Transformational investments in clean energy to fight the climate crisis

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 4 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Martin Heinrich. The social-media posture reads as constructive or diplomatic signal because the strongest matched frame is support, partnership, or official-contact language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around support, partnership, or official-contact language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 1 supportive or diplomatic hit, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 4 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2024-10-31T17:34:03Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.

ICYMI: The LGBTQ+ community is welcome in New Mexico.
https://t.co/BIvyDotnJF

Dear Disney,

You and your workers are always welcome in New Mexico.
https://t.co/pKRzcROzDH
Yes, I’m afraid Democrats have come out in favor of [checks notes] feeding children.

In New Mexico we have a saying, “Dime con quién andas, y te diré quien eres” - it means “Tell me who you hang around with, and I’ll tell you who you are.”

MAGA Republicans are called white nationalists all the time for a reason.

Washington is full of people who are working for themselves.

I work for New Mexico, and it is the honor of my life.

That’s why I’m all in for re-election. https://t.co/E3WHMTTnxP
https://t.co/lTyVxeMwDs

Here's a few off the top of my head:

✅ Historically low unemployment rate
✅ 12 million new jobs
✅ $35 cap on insulin for seniors
✅ More Americans than ever have quality, affordable health care
✅ Transformational investments in clean energy to fight the climate crisis

Roses are red
We shot down the balloon
The last time the grid went down
You went and hid  in Cancún
If you’re quoting Martin Luther King, Jr. while simultaneously making it harder for people to vote, you’re doing it wrong.
Tongs, really?

In college, I was part of a team that built a carbon-fiber solar car that had features like regenerative braking and LED lights, common features of modern day plug-in vehicles. We were ahead of our time. Except when it came to the hair. That…was very much of the time. https://t.co/Acvi1aJ5Eb

This January, the cost of insulin will be capped at $35 for Medicare beneficiaries. 

You’d have to ask Republicans why they voted against it.
When someone tells me climate change is a hoax: https://t.co/ktXMnecPZw
Happy Birthday, President @JoeBiden! Thank you for fighting for the American people and our planet.
More than 20,000 New Mexicans took advantage of same-day voter registration in this year’s midterm election. Proud to be from a state that makes it easier to vote, not harder.

There will never be another like her.

Thank you, Speaker Pelosi. https://t.co/aPi4wVYsAx

Let’s do this! I’m 100% in, @Bob_Casey, @brianschatz. New Mexico, can you chip in with me?? I can’t imagine a better response to the announcement out of Florida tonight, than to help re-elect @ReverendWarnock.

It’s official. The people and values of New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District will now, once again, have representation in the House of Representatives. 

Congratulations, @Gabe_NM! https://t.co/BRnmTF7TTr
I'm in! And I won't even wait to be tagged, @ossoff, @brianschatz, @CoryBooker! Let's do this! I wired my max. Who else out there can help?

Local elections matter. New Mexico’s archaic anti-abortion laws were overturned by electing pro-choice state lawmakers. If SCOTUS overturns Roe v. Wade, we must continue to organize and elect pro-choice state lawmakers nationwide.
Elected officials are supposed to represent the voice of the people. When the vast majority of Americans support Roe v. Wade, passing the Women’s Health Protection Act shouldn’t even be a question.
We need to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act so we can codify Roe v. Wade into law and deliver the meaningful reform that voters demanded in the 2020 election.

Big news: Creation of the Civilian Climate Corps is officially part of the #BuildBackBetter Act. That's 300k new jobs to curb pollution & directly impact communities.

I was the first AmeriCorps alum to serve in the Senate. I know what a difference national service can make.
An infrastructure plan that doesn’t address climate change isn’t an infrastructure plan I can accept.

Early voting is underway in #NM01 and @MelanieforNM has proven herself to be a champion for families across New Mexico time and time again. I hope you’ll join me in supporting her. I know she’ll bring her strength and passion to fight for us in congress. https://t.co/vLhR7ui5Gp
https://t.co/rz9faK00AO

A clear majority of Puerto Ricans want statehood. It’s time we listen.  That’s why I introduced the Puerto Rico Admission Act. Let’s make Puerto Rico the 51st state in our union. 
https://t.co/PADowttoCn
https://t.co/s1M91iErQQ
When any New Mexican watches the Rachel Ray episode on making posole… https://t.co/sbM6UP7IFr

My staff and I are safe. Today's events are shocking and sad, but I am eager to complete the process of certifying Joe Biden as the next President of the United States and to begin healing our great nation.

Hey @ChrisMurphyCT , @brianschatz , @CoryBooker , @SenGillibrand  - Looks like we need to rally our Fight Club!  

First new rule of the Biden Fight Club: Talk about the Biden Fight Club. 

How much can we raise?? #BidenFightFund 

https://t.co/XtGDWezSsL

Here's the deal, @ossoff is running one heck of a race. Rated as a "Toss-Up", he's in a 1-2 point race. Republican super-PACs reserved $27 million of TV time against Jon, plus another $7 million reserved by Perdue directly. And then the Koch Network got in. #FliptheSenate
I need @ossoff as a colleague, and our country needs him in the Senate. Let's #FlipTheSenate and get @ossoff the support he needs. https://t.co/NRlDnTyWKC

Folks, Barbara Bollier is amazing. She’d put Kansas first and she’d be an incredible US Senator. She also know a heck of a lot about health care. She’s exactly who need right now. 

Let’s get her some support today and she’ll take this race from there! @brianschatz

Want to see an example of racist and despicable political commentary? It’s apparently all the @NewMexicoGOP trades in these days. 

Seriously, New Mexico, we need to be very clear: Disparaging and denigrating Native Americans is absolutely not acceptable.

Joining my pals @ChrisMurphyCT @CoryBooker @brianschatz to raise $200K to help @mjheg win in Texas this November. This race is critical to our fight to take back the Senate. Can you help out and pitch in? https://t.co/n5MKuSaX3G
@brianschatz is right! We‘ve got a real chance at sending @MikeEspyMS to the Senate and giving Mississippi the leader it deserves. Let’s raise Espy some money! #ditchmitch https://t.co/Dab7yB5QSH

Two of these people believe in protecting the Grand Canyon...

Donald Trump 
Joe Biden
Teddy Roosevelt 

And by the way, it’s not the first guy.  

No Mount Rushmore for you DJT.
Netflix and chile.
